mapper.select: select f.id, f.title, f.content, f.user_id, f.type, f.create_time, f.reply_content, f.reply_user_id, f.reply_time, f.status, coalesce(u.nick_name, u.user_name) as reply_user_name from feedback f left join user u on f.reply_user_id = u.id where f.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into feedback(id, title, content, user_id, type, create_time, reply_content, reply_user_id, reply_time, status) values (#{id}, #{title}, #{content}, #{userId}, #{type,typeHandler=com.caohao.config.EnumValueTypeHandler}, #{createTime}, #{replyContent}, #{replyUserId}, #{replyTime}, #{status})

insert into feedback(id, title, content, user_id, type, create_time, reply_content, reply_user_id, reply_time, status) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.title}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUserId}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.status})

insert into feedback(title, content, user_id, type, create_time, reply_content, reply_user_id, reply_time, status) values
(#{entity.title}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.replyContent}, #{entity.replyUserId}, #{entity.replyTime}, #{entity.status})
on duplicate key update title = values(title), content = values(content), user_id = values(user_id), type = values(type), create_time = values(create_time), reply_content = values(reply_content), reply_user_id = values(reply_user_id), reply_time = values(reply_time), status = values(status)
mapper.update:
update feedback
title = #{title},
content = #{content},
user_id = #{userId},
type = #{type,typeHandler=com.caohao.config.EnumValueTypeHandler},
create_time = #{createTime},
reply_content = #{replyContent},
reply_user_id = #{replyUserId},
reply_time = #{replyTime},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
